prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWC-AFLELHBWO-MED-BLCK-OVAL Product Type: WALLET Brand (from catalog): ASR Federal Existing Title: ASR Federal Black Leather Bifold Wallet Police Badge Holder with Removable ID Card Holder, Oval Description: The ASR Federal Black Leather Police Bifold Wallet Badge Holder has been designed for private and public security professionals, who at times, require discretion of their ID for undercover, covert or plainclothes operations. The wallet features a compact design that includes a removable ID card holder, a cash compartment, credit card slots, an interior suede badge protection flap and recessed badge cut-out mount.

Made from 100% genuine leather, this badge holder wallet boasts a strong and sturdy construction with reinforced stitching and a heavy gauge leather body; the badge holder will relax over time with use as it molds to your carrying habits, but will never forego its integrity and structure. Furthermore, the removable ID card holder that easily slides in or out from the center of the bifold wallet, giving you ample space for other cards, photos and more; the ID card holder also helps to shield badges from sight, adding another layer of discretion. Lastly, the police badge holder and ID card holder features a built in suede badge protection flap to keep badges scratch free and more importantly, hidden from view if necessary in covert field situations.

Badge attachment is clip-back, no screws required. This wallet is specifically designed for an oval-shaped badge (Maximum Badge Size: 3 3/8 x 2 1/4 inches); badge wallet holders for shield or round badges are available.

NOTE: Badge is NOT included with purchase; Please be sure to measure YOUR specific badge to ensure it fits this wallet Search Terms: fbi id card holder bifold wallets for men police gear tactical gear leather black detective undercover cops CIA credential holder law enforcement equipment security SWAT private investigator CSI federal badge holder identification secret service Features: - POLICE BADGE HOLDER WALLET: The badge holder is designed for private and public security professionals who at times require discretion of their ID for undercover, covert or plainclothes operations; the wallet features a compact design that includes a removable ID card holder, a cash compartment, credit card slots, a suede badge protection flap and recessed badge cut-out mount - REMOVABLE ID CARD HOLDER: The wallet includes a compact and removable ID card holder that easily slides in or out from the center of the leather bifold wallet, giving you ample space for other cards, photos and more; the ID card holder also helps to shield badges from sight, adding another layer of discretion - SUEDE BADGE PROTECTION FLAP: The police badge holder and ID card holder features a built in suede badge protection flap to keep badges scratch free and more importantly, hidden from view if necessary in covert field situations - GENUINE LEATHER MATERIAL: This badge holder boasts a strong and sturdy construction with reinforced stitching and a heavy gauge leather body; the badge holder will relax over time with use as it molds to your carrying habits, but will never forego its integrity and structure - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4.5 x 3.5 x 1 inches; Max Card Size: 2.75" x 4"; Max Badge Size: 3 3/8 x 2 1/4 inches; Color: Black; Materials: Genuine Leather; Note: Badge attachment is clip-back, no screws required === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Federal Black Leather Bifold Police Badge Holder Wallet

openai.item_name: ASR Federal Oval Black Leather Badge Wallet

anthropic.title_differentiation: Removable ID Card Holder, Genuine Leather, Suede Badge Protection, Undercover Discrete Operations
